title: Trump promises imminent release of “very interesting” UFO files as public curiosity surges
description: The debate over unidentified flying objects-now more commonly referred to as unidentified aerial phenomena (UAP)-is once again gaining momentum after comments from Donald Trump, who has indicated that his administration is preparing to release a new tranche of government files on the subject. Describing some of the material as “very interesting,” Trump’s remarks have reignited [...] The post Trump promises imminent release of “very interesting” UFO files as public curiosity surges appeared first on BLiTZ .

title: US Navy Pilots Stunned As 'Gimbal' UFO Outpaces F-18 Jets And Defies Physics Over Florida Skies
description: The Gimbal incident, a 2015 UFO sighting by US Navy pilots, remains unresolved. Investigations continue, focusing on sensor effects and known aerial objects.

title: JD Vance Slammed As Steven Greer Warns 'Demon UFO' Claim Could Trigger Global Panic
description: Vice President JD Vance's comments on UFOs being demonic have sparked controversy, with Dr. Steven Greer warning of potential global panic and urging a scientific approach to disclosure

title: 17 Earthquakes In 24 Hours Near Area 51 Fuel Wild UFO And Underground Testing Rumours
description: Seventeen earthquakes near Nevada's Area 51 have sparked rumours of underground testing and UFO activity. Experts attribute the quakes to natural causes, but speculation persists due to the site's secrecy

title: 'Nuclear test' or 'UFO'? Earthquakes rock Area 51 amid US-Iran war: What's happening
description: A cluster of small earthquakes near Area 51 in Nevada has triggered speculation online, with some linking the tremors to secret military or nuclear tests, though the site is historically known for aircraft testing and not confirmed for such activities.
